description_long: This object is a compact head of red cabbage, characterized by its tightly layered, overlapping leaves that form a nearly spherical shape. The outer leaves display a striking deep reddish-purple color with prominent white veins radiating from the base toward the edges. The surface texture appears slightly crinkled and matte, with subtle undulations and folds, especially near the leaf margins. The coloration is variegated, with some areas showing more intense purple and others dominated by creamy white, particularly where the leaves converge. The overall form is dense and solid, with no visible stem or root, and the leaf edges are mostly smooth with gentle waviness. There are no visible signs of moisture or water droplets on the surface.
description: A dense, spherical head of red cabbage with tightly packed, deep reddish-purple and white veined leaves. The surface is matte, slightly crinkled, and shows gentle undulations.
description_view_0: This view highlights the deep reddish-purple leaves with prominent white veins and a slightly crinkled surface, showing the layered structure of the cabbage.
description_view_1: The view emphasizes the pale, creamy white base of the leaves, with streaks of purple radiating outward and a smoother, less textured appearance.
description_view_2: This side displays the darkest concentration of purple, with white veins less pronounced and the leaf layering appearing more compact and dense.
description_view_3: Here, the white portion of the leaves is more dominant, with purple edges and a visible transition between the two colors, showing the curvature of the outer leaves.
attribute_leaf_arrangement: The leaves are tightly packed and overlap concentrically, forming a dense, spherical head with each leaf wrapping closely around the inner core. The orientation of the leaves is generally parallel to the surface, with the outermost leaves curving inward toward the center.
attribute_leaf_edge_pattern: The leaf edges are mostly smooth with gentle, undulating waves.
attribute_outer_leaf_curling: The outermost leaves exhibit moderate curling, folding inward toward the center in a natural, protective pattern.
